query:
SELECT
            u.id,
            u.email,
            u.username,
            u.trial_ends_at,
            u.access_expires_at,
            u.expiry_notif_sent_at,
            lt.duration_days,
            lt.license_type
        FROM public.users u
        LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
            SELECT duration_days, license_type
            FROM public.license_tokens
            WHERE used_by = u.id AND used_at IS NOT NULL
            ORDER BY used_at DESC
            LIMIT 1
        ) lt ON true
        WHERE
            u.access_expires_at > NOW()
            OR u.trial_ends_at > NOW()
